parsed_output.justification: The transcript is incoherent and contains numerous claims about swapping cards, but there is no clear evidence of any player definitively holding the werewolf card.  Multiple participants assert they are werewolves, but none provide hard proof—most statements appear contradictory or unverified.  With no reliable indicator of a werewolf in the group, the safest strategy is to vote no one (circle).
